Barracuda Cloud Backup

    Overview

    View the Barracuda Networks Online Service Terms on the Barracuda Networks website.

    Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup offers complete, granular protection of your data with point-in-time retrieval, and both scheduled and on-demand backup. In addition, your data is deduplicated and compressed to maximize storage efficiency and minimize the backup window. Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup for Microsoft 365 and Entra ID protects your data by backing up directly to Barracuda Cloud Storage. For more details about what data is backed up within Cloud-to-Cloud Backup, see Understanding What Data is Backed UpPreview.

    For a list of features, improvements, and frequently asked questions (FAQs), see Release Notes and Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ).

    Scheduled Backups

    Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup automatically sets a schedule to back up your data or you can run backups on-demand at any time. When possible, data is deduplicated and compressed for maximum efficiency before being stored in the Barracuda Cloud.

    Restore and Export Data

    All data backed up to the Barracuda Cloud is accessible, searchable, and retrievable from anywhere with an Internet connection. Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup not only allows for restoring data to a restore target but also provides the ability to export and download data directly to your workstation or directly to Microsoft Azure Blob Storage, offering greater flexibility in data recovery options. The user interface also displays a comprehensive list of all recoverable revisions for a selected item, simplifying the process of choosing the exact revision needed. Additionally, the Purge On-Demand capability allows users to permanently delete selected backup data and all associated revisions, which is crucial for compliance with regulations like GDPR. This feature provides granular control, enabling the targeting of specific files, folders, or user data without impacting the rest of the backup set.

    Microsoft 365

    Microsoft 365 restore files or email messages back to the original user account and location, to a different location within the account, or to a completely different user account. If you are looking for a specific file or message but are unsure of its location, use the search feature to quickly and easily find the item, and then restore or download the item. Downloading folders puts them into a compressed ZIP file for quick downloads, while email messages are downloaded using PST format. Files are downloaded using their same file format. If you select to download multiple files, the files are downloaded as a ZIP file.

    Entra ID

    Entra ID can restore objects back to the original location only. Unlike backups of Microsoft 365 data, the concept of ‘alternate restore’ is not applicable for Entra ID, because there are no alternate locations for the data – there is only a single repository for the entire tenant. The purpose of restoring from Entra ID Backup is to restore all the attributes and relationships of the object to a useful state, which requires restoration to the original location. If you are looking for a specific object but are unsure of its location, use the search feature to quickly and easily find the item, and then restore or download the item. Downloading folders puts them into a compressed ZIP file for quick downloads. Files are downloaded using their same file format. If you select to download multiple files, the files are downloaded as a ZIP file.

    Reports and Statistics

    Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup provides backup status for each backup source. Automated email alerts are delivered after each backup to specified email recipients containing a summary of the backup and detailed information about which email messages and files were added, modified, and removed since the last backup. The Dashboard page includes tables showing the number of items added and amount of data backed up each day, including details for how much data has been backed up per backup source and the restore and export status of each backup source. An Audit Log tracks and provides details about every action performed within the Cloud-to-Cloud Backup interface.

    Security

    With Barracuda Cloud-to-Cloud Backup, all data is encrypted in-transit with 128-bit SSL encryption, the same level of security used by most banks and financial institutions. Data stored in the Barracuda Cloud is encrypted at-rest using 256-bit AES encryption. Barracuda Cloud Storage regularly undergoes third-party audits and is SSAE 16 Type II certified. Additional layers of protection included in Barracuda Cloud Control are multi-factor authentication and role-based administration.

    We value your feedback.
    If you have questions, suggestions, or feedback on our documentation, contact the Campus Product Documentation team.
    For general product inquiries or technical support, please contact the global Barracuda Support team.
